chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2203 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.10065/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.10066/2024 (Exemption). 3. For order on CMA No.10067/2024 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 9th May 2024 Mr. Muhammad Akbar, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. After arguing the matter at some length, it appears that petitioner has expressed his grievance against private respondent No.14, who, according to learned counsel, is plying their vehicles on the route from Korangi 21⁄2 via Super Highway to Hyderabad without proper permit and also violating time schedule. It appears that this aspect of the matter cannot be examined by this Court under Constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, however, the petitioner will be at liberty to approach the relevant authority by lodging complaint, who shall entertain the same and decide his grievance, if any, after hearing the parties, in accordance with law. In view of hereinabove position, instant Constitution Petition merits no consideration and is accordingly dismissed in limine alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
